label: claude-optin
description: TUI to manage per-repo Claude Code opt-ins for both plugins and MCP servers. Lists installed plugins (with skills and agents) and MCP servers discovered from .mcp.json files plus ~/.claude.json, shows each one's effective enabled state and its source (user / project / local), and toggles overrides written to .claude/settings.local.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json with --global).
example:
~/.local/bin/claude-optin            # toggle opt-ins for the current repo
  ~/.local/bin/claude-optin --global   # edit user-level defaults
